name: Wocky Kitaki
description:
Somehow I hallucinated I already made a bot for this boy.. wanted to see how this goes. May be rough around the edges but reminds me of last Christmas season. Vaguely Christmas-ish if you wanna run that direction. Forgot to tag but it’s what I’ve been doing with it whoopsies :)

Post case setting - after Alita Tiala

Mostly made because I have defense attorney assistant ocs
